ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "trial_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the trial */,
  "pt_test_acc" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the test set without attacks */,
  "pt_gaussian_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the test set with Gaussian noise attack */,
  "pt_deepfool_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the test set with Deepfool attack */,
  "tf_test_acc" REAL /* Accuracy of the TensorFlow model on the test set without attacks */,
  "tf_gaussian_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the TensorFlow model on the test set with Gaussian noise attack */,
  "tf_deepfool_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the TensorFlow model on the test set with Deepfool attack */,
  "average_res" REAL /* Average result across different metrics */,
  "time_this_iter_s" REAL /* Time taken for this iteration in seconds */,
  "done" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the experiment is completed */,
  "timesteps_total" REAL /* Total number of timesteps */,
  "episodes_total" REAL /* Total number of episodes */,
  "training_iteration" INTEGER /* Number of training iterations completed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the experiment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the experiment */,
  "time_total_s" INTEGER /* Total time taken for the experiment in seconds */,
  "pid" TEXT /* Process ID of the experiment */,
  "hostname" TEXT /* Hostname of the machine running the experiment */,
  "node_ip" REAL /* IP address of the node running the experiment */,
  "time_since_restore" INTEGER /* Time since the last restore in seconds */,
  "timesteps_since_restore" INTEGER /* Number of timesteps since the last restore */,
  "iterations_since_restore" INTEGER /* Number of iterations since the last restore */,
  "experiment_tag" TEXT /* Tag for the experiment */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used in the experiment */,
  "dropout" REAL /* Dropout rate used in the experiment */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used in the experiment */,
  "adam_epsilon" REAL /* Adam epsilon value used in the experiment */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs used in the experiment */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user who ran the experiment */,
  "collaborator_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of user IDs for collaborators */,
  "pt_mse" REAL /* Mean Squared Error for the PyTorch model */,
  "pt_mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error for the PyTorch model */,
  "tf_mse" REAL /* Mean Squared Error for the TensorFlow model */,
  "tf_mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error for the TensorFlow model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for triggering alerts based on performance metrics */,
  "alert_triggered" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if an alert has been triggered */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level required to view or modify the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used in the experiment */,
  "dropout" REAL /* Dropout rate used in the experiment */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used in the experiment */,
  "adam_epsilon" REAL /* Adam epsilon value used in the experiment */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs used in the experiment */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Type of optimizer used */,
  "loss_function" TEXT /* Type of loss function used */,
  "activation_function" TEXT /* Type of activation function used */,
  "model_architecture" TEXT /* Description of the model architecture */,
  "layer_count" INTEGER /* Number of layers in the model */,
  "hidden_units" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of hidden units in each layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the alert */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric that triggered the alert */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric that triggered the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
